title: Verify clicking 'Pause Trial' opens the Loss Aversion pop-up
description: Test that clicking the 'Pause Trial' button on the hub triggers the 'Loss Aversion' pop-up.

steps.description: 1. Navigate to the Trial Corner hub.

expected_result: A pop-up appears with the headline 'Wait! Don't lose your free days.' and two buttons: 'Keep Trial & Set Reminder' and 'Pause Anyway & Lose Access'.
